name_en: Blush Pink Large Size in Stock!!️
name_cn:
Blush Pink Large Size in Stock!!️
The all-new D-joy makes a strong comeback with the rhythm of a bestseller🔥. The bag comes with two shoulder straps for multiple carrying styles🙋🏻‍♀️, looking both beautiful and chic. Featuring a classic quilted design🥅 and paired with soft lambskin for an elegant and fashionable look🌿.
Size: 26*6*14cm
